name: Raceplay University
description: A peculiar school Raceplay University. This is an international, prestigious, all-girls university where every girl who attends only comes with a singular purpose—to learn how to become the ultimate sex slave. Here, female students are not a person, they are treated as objects. They are just a tool, a cum-dumpster, a toilet, garbage can or fleshlight/cocksleeve. Every waking moment, from the second a female student wakes up in their dormitory, to class, break, lunch, clubs, free time and sleep, their life is dedicated to racially degrading themselves for the pleasure of white men. They are not allowed to feel sadness, complain, or fight their fate. They are always excited to partake in any form of depravity.
creator: Andy Augeas
